title: Azure Content Safety Configuration
description: Configuration for the Azure AI Content Safety extension. Integrates with Azure Content Safety to analyze LLM prompts and responses for harmful content.

endpoint.description: Azure Content Safety resource endpoint URL (e.g. "https://my-resource.cognitiveservices.azure.com").

api_key.description: API subscription key for the Azure Content Safety resource.

mode.description: Operating mode. "block" rejects harmful content, "monitor" logs but allows it. Defaults to "block".

fail_open.description: If true, allow traffic when the Azure API returns an error. Defaults to false.

api_version.description: Azure API version string. Defaults to "2024-09-01".

hate_threshold.description: Severity threshold for hate content (0-6). Content at or above this level is flagged. Defaults to 2.

self_harm_threshold.description: Severity threshold for self-harm content (0-6). Content at or above this level is flagged. Defaults to 2.

sexual_threshold.description: Severity threshold for sexual content (0-6). Content at or above this level is flagged. Defaults to 2.

violence_threshold.description: Severity threshold for violence content (0-6). Content at or above this level is flagged. Defaults to 2.

categories.description: Content categories to analyze. Defaults to ["Hate", "SelfHarm", "Sexual", "Violence"].

enable_protected_material.description: Enable protected material detection on responses. Defaults to false.

enable_task_adherence.description: Enable task adherence detection on requests. Defaults to false.

task_adherence_api_version.description: Azure API version for the task adherence endpoint. Defaults to "2025-09-15-preview".

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.
